title: unidrive config.toml
description: Schema for unidrive's config.toml. Derived from RawSyncConfig / RawGeneral / RawProvider in core/app/sync/src/main/kotlin/org/krost/unidrive/sync/SyncConfig.kt. Keys mirror the TOML (snake_case) exactly. Unknown keys are ignored by the loader (ktoml ignoreUnknownNames=true); this schema marks `additionalProperties: false` for the shapes that are fully known, so strict validators will flag typos.

providers.description: Map of profile id → provider config. Profile id is used as `unidrive -p <id> ...`. If the id matches a known provider type, `type` may be omitted.

$comment: Top-level `required` is empty: a missing config.toml yields SyncConfig.defaults() (see SyncConfig.load()). Both [general] and [providers] default to empty.

SyncDirection.$comment: parseDirection() is case-insensitive and falls back to 'bidirectional' for unknown values; this schema enforces the canonical lowercase spellings.

ConflictPolicy.$comment: parsePolicy() is case-insensitive and falls back to 'keep_both' for unknown values.

ProviderType.$comment: Sourced from ProviderRegistry.knownTypes (SPI-discovered). Unknown values cause resolveProfile() to throw IllegalArgumentException.

General.description: RawGeneral → top-level fields on SyncConfig. Every field is optional; omitted fields use the defaults below (as applied by RawSyncConfig.toSyncConfig()).

default_profile.description: UD-252: profile used when the CLI or MCP jar is invoked without `-p <name>`. Resolved by SyncConfig.resolveDefaultProfile(configDir). When unset, both jars fall back to "onedrive".

sync_root.description: Root directory of the local mirror. Tilde `~` is expanded. Defaults to $HOME/<ProviderType capitalized> for the active profile.

min_poll_interval.description: ACTIVE-state poll interval (seconds). Loader coerces into [5, poll_interval].

max_poll_interval.description: IDLE-state poll interval (seconds). Loader coerces to ≥ poll_interval.

log_file.description: Optional path to a log file. Tilde `~` is expanded.

max_bandwidth_kbps.description: Global bandwidth ceiling in KiB/s. Null = unlimited.

max_delete_percentage.description: Deletion safeguard: abort if a run would delete more than this % of tracked files. Coerced into [0, 100] by the loader.

exclude_patterns.description: Globs skipped during reconciliation. Merged with per-profile exclude_patterns.

trash_emulation.description: Emulate trash under {profile-dir}/.trash when OS trash is unavailable.

Provider.description: RawProvider — one profile. All fields are optional at the schema level; which subset is mandatory depends on the `type` and is enforced at runtime by each ProviderFactory. The conditional blocks below encode the common cases.

type.$comment: Optional only when the profile id IS one of ProviderType (in which case the id doubles as the type).

sync_root.description: Per-profile local root. Tilde `~` is expanded. Must be unique across profiles (detectDuplicateSyncRoots()). Falls back to [general].sync_root, then $HOME/<Type>.

root_path.description: Legacy alias for sync_root, accepted only by localfs. Prefer sync_root.

conflict_overrides.description: Map<glob, ConflictPolicy>. Keys with surrounding double quotes have them stripped by the loader.

access_key_id.description: S3 access key id. May be supplied via vault.enc instead.

identity.description: Absolute path to SSH private key.

password.description: Password or key passphrase. Vault preferred.

authority_url.description: OneDrive/MSAL authority URL. Null → MSAL default (login.microsoftonline.com/common).

include_shared.description: OneDrive: include sharedWithMe items in delta.

webhook.description: OneDrive: register a Graph webhook subscription alongside polling.

webhook_url.description: OneDrive: public HTTPS URL the webhook will POST to.

webhook_port.$comment: TODO: declared in RawProvider but not currently read by any caller (verified 2026-04-18). Kept in schema for parity with the data class; remove if still dead at v0.1.0.

xtra_encryption.description: Enable client-side AES-GCM encryption via XtraKeyManager. Requires vault-held key material.

rclone_binary.description: Path to rclone binary; null → PATH lookup.

rclone_config.description: Path to rclone.conf; null → rclone default.

then.$comment: localfs accepts either sync_root (preferred) or root_path (legacy) as the target directory.
OneDrive webhook=true requires a reachable webhook_url for Graph to POST to.
